_publications._publicationTitle: Aberrant oscillatory activity in neurofibromatosis type 1: an EEG study of resting state and working memory.

_contextSnippet: For CON, four negative age-power correlations survived FDR correction: eyes open delta (r = −0.600, p = 0.014, q = 0.018), eyes closed delta (r = −0.705, p = 0.002, q = 0.005)
details: Successfully performed statistical analyses including ANOVAs and correlations, enabling detection of significant age-power correlations in controls that survived FDR correction
